chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The Penalty (Hadd) regarding the lesbianism

text: لَيْسَ لِامْرَأَتَيْنِ أَنْ تَبِيتَا فِي لِحَافٍ وَاحِدٍ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ بَيْنَهُمَا حَاجِزٌ فَإِنْ فَعَلَتَا نُهِيَتَا عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَإِنْ وُجِدَتَا مَعَ النَّهْيِ جُلِدَتْ كُلُّ وَاحِدَةٍ مِنْهُمَا حَدّاً حَدّاً فَإِنْ وُجِدَتَا أَيْضاً فِي لِحَافٍ جُلِدَتَا فَإِنْ وُجِدَتَا الثَّالِثَةَ قُتِلَتَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Abdul Raham Bin Abu Hashim, from Abu Khadeeja,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It is not for the two women that they should be sleeping in one quilt, except that there happens to be in between the two of them, a partition. So if they were to do that, they should be prevented from that. So if they were to be found after having been prevented, each one of them would be whipped a Penalty (Hadd), a Penalty (Hadd) (one hundred lashes each). So if they were both found again in one quilt, they would be whipped. So if they were found for the third times, they would both be killed’.
